title: POST /books endpoint for creating books

title: GET /books endpoint with ?author= filter support
evidence: src/books/handler.clj:45-48 list-books function, test/books/handler_test.clj:56-64 list-and-filter-books test

title: GET /books/{id} endpoint for retrieving single book
evidence: src/books/handler.clj:50-55 get-book function, test/books/handler_test.clj:70-72 get by id test

title: PUT /books/{id} endpoint for updating books
evidence: src/books/handler.clj:57-69 update-book function, test/books/handler_test.clj:76-81 update test

title: DELETE /books/{id} endpoint for deleting books
evidence: src/books/handler.clj:71-76 delete-book function, test/books/handler_test.clj:82-85 delete test

title: SQLite database storage
evidence: src/books/db.clj:1-16 uses next.jdbc with SQLite, deps.edn includes org.xerial/sqlite-jdbc

title: JSON responses with appropriate HTTP status codes
evidence: src/books/handler.clj:7-11 json-response helper uses correct status codes (201 for create, 200 for get/list/update, 204 for delete, 400/404 for errors)

title: Input validation for required fields (title and author)
evidence: src/books/handler.clj:20-27 validate function, test/books/handler_test.clj:45-54 create-book-validation test verifies validation

title: GET /health health check endpoint
evidence: src/books/handler.clj:80 health endpoint, test/books/handler_test.clj:31-34 health-check test

title: README.md with setup and run instructions
evidence: README.md includes setup requirements, run instructions, endpoints documentation, examples, and project layout

title: 5 unit/integration tests (exceeds requirement of 3)
evidence: test/books/handler_test.clj contains 5 test cases: health-check, create-book-success, create-book-validation, list-and-filter-books, get-update-delete-book

title: All 5 tests passed
evidence: Test run output: Ran 5 tests containing 20 assertions. 0 failures, 0 errors.
